skills.name: Action Plan Rewrite Coach
skills.description: Converts vague advice into concrete, sequenced action plans with ownership, timing, and measurable outcomes. Effective for personal productivity, study routines, fitness goals, and team execution plans.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Assumption Risk Audit
skills.description: Audits hidden assumptions in plans, advice, and drafts, then replaces fragile assumptions with testable alternatives. Useful for business, education, operations, and personal planning where uncertainty can silently derail outcomes.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Context Prioritization Analyst
skills.description: Filters noisy context and elevates the highest-signal information for focused decision-making. Works well for research synthesis, policy briefs, customer support triage, and meeting preparation.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Debugging Root Cause Playbook
skills.description: A structured debugging skill that turns vague failure reports into evidence-backed root cause findings, low-risk fixes, and regression prevention steps suitable for engineering teams and technical leads.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Decision Tradeoff Workbench
skills.description: Builds structured option comparisons with transparent tradeoffs and recommendation logic. Useful for product choices, career moves, study paths, procurement decisions, and policy alternatives.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Evidence Confidence Calibrator
skills.description: Separates claims, interpretations, and recommendations while calibrating confidence levels. Designed for research summaries, healthcare communication, policy memos, and any response where factual precision matters.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Failure Prevention Playbook
skills.description: Forecasts likely failure modes and turns them into practical prevention and recovery playbooks. Designed for teams and individuals who need resilient execution under changing conditions.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Instruction Priority Mediator
skills.description: Resolves conflicting instructions using transparent priority rules and documented tradeoffs. Ideal for policy-heavy workflows, multi-stakeholder requests, and compliance-sensitive communication.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Lesson Plan and Explainer Designer
skills.description: An education-focused skill that designs clear, step-by-step learning content with objectives, prerequisite checks, examples, practice tasks, and assessment criteria.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Long-Form Writing Coach
skills.description: A writing skill that develops stronger long-form pieces by improving structure, argument flow, voice consistency, evidence use, and revision quality for reports, articles, and essays.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Marketing Campaign Message Architect
skills.description: A marketing skill that crafts audience-specific campaign messaging with clear positioning, value propositions, channel adaptations, and conversion-focused creative direction.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Operations Runbook and Incident Response
skills.description: An operations skill that builds practical runbooks for routine tasks and incident response, with triggers, ownership, escalation paths, communication templates, and post-incident learning loops.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Project Constraint Briefing
skills.description: Transforms vague requests into a precise, execution-ready constraint brief. It identifies hard requirements, soft preferences, timeline boundaries, excluded scope, and compliance conditions so teams can start with fewer rework cycles.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Project Scope and Requirements Brief
skills.description: A planning skill that converts broad requests into a practical requirements brief with clear scope boundaries, assumptions, acceptance criteria, milestones, and decision checkpoints.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Quality Evaluation Rubric Designer
skills.description: Creates measurable rubrics to evaluate answer quality, project deliverables, or learning artifacts. Supports educational grading, QA reviews, content audits, and performance coaching.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Research Synthesis and Insight Analyst
skills.description: A research skill that turns scattered notes and sources into coherent findings, patterns, confidence-rated insights, and actionable recommendations.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Scenario Stress Test Planner
skills.description: Pressure-tests plans against realistic edge scenarios and failure paths. Works for software launches, travel itineraries, event operations, and household logistics where one disruption can cascade.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Software Test Design and Quality Gate
skills.description: A software quality skill that creates risk-prioritized test designs and release gate criteria across unit, integration, and end-to-end levels with measurable pass conditions.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Stakeholder Communication Drafter
skills.description: A communication skill that drafts clear stakeholder updates, proposals, and difficult messages with audience-aware tone, decision clarity, and concrete next steps.
skills.author: agnes0912491

skills.name: Strategy Option Evaluator
skills.description: An analysis skill for comparing strategic options with transparent criteria, weighted trade-offs, risks, confidence notes, and an explicit recommendation for decision makers.
skills.author: agnes0912491
